test_cases.title: Verify quick workout customization options are available and functional
steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Quick Workout' section.
Select a workout duration (e.g., 10, 15, 20 minutes).
Choose an intensity level (low, medium, high).
Select a focus area (e.g., full body, upper body, lower body).
Start the workout and verify it follows the selected parameters.
test_cases.expected_result: The app generates a workout matching the user's selections, and the workout runs without errors.

test_cases.title: Verify landscape mode works on all main screens
steps: Launch the app in portrait mode.
Rotate the device to landscape orientation.
Navigate through the home screen, workout list, and exercise detail screens.
Ensure all UI elements are properly resized and no content is cut off.
test_cases.expected_result: The app seamlessly switches to landscape orientation, and all screens display correctly without overlapping or missing elements.

test_cases.title: Verify exercise animations/videos play correctly
steps: Open an exercise detail screen that previously had static text.
Check that an animation or video is displayed.
Tap the play button and observe the demonstration.
Verify that the animation/video loops or has a replay option.
test_cases.expected_result: The exercise is demonstrated via animation or video, playing smoothly with clear instructions.

test_cases.title: Verify free tier offers meaningful features without payment
steps: Install the app and sign up without subscribing.
Access the free tier features (e.g., basic workouts, progress tracking).
Attempt to use a premium feature and verify a clear upgrade prompt appears.
Complete a basic workout and check that progress is saved.
test_cases.expected_result: Free tier users can access a set of valuable features, and premium features are clearly marked but not accessible without payment.

test_cases.title: Verify women-specific content and difficulty levels are available
steps: Navigate to the workout library.
Filter or browse by 'Women' category.
Select a workout plan labeled for women.
Check that difficulty levels (beginner, intermediate, advanced) are available.
test_cases.expected_result: Workout plans and difficulty levels tailored for women are present and functional.

test_cases.title: Verify purchased content downloads successfully
steps: Purchase a course or workout pack.
Navigate to the 'My Purchases' section.
Tap the download button for the purchased content.
Wait for the download to complete and then open the content.
test_cases.expected_result: The content downloads without errors and is accessible offline.

test_cases.title: Verify app language matches device language setting
steps: Change the device language to a supported language (e.g., Spanish, French).
Launch the app.
Check that all UI text, menus, and instructions are displayed in the device language.
Navigate to settings and verify a manual language selector is available.
test_cases.expected_result: The app automatically displays in the device's language, and users can manually switch languages if needed.
